mapper.select: SELECT cct.tabulation_id, cct.module_type FROM t_car_cost_tabulation cct LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON cct.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_car_cost_category ccc ON cct.category_id = ccc.category_id where cct.waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY cct.create_time DESC,cct.tabulation_id DESC
